summary: The user sought recipe ideas for chicken breasts purchased at Walmart and shared that they received their first Blue Apron meal kit, which included salmon, chicken fajitas, and a veggie stir-fry. They decided to modify a Lemon Garlic Chicken recipe to include Yukon Gold potatoes and vegetables, and discussed wine pairing options, ultimately choosing to try a bottle of Cabernet Sauvignon from Trader Joe's.
facts: The user bought chicken breasts at Walmart last Sunday.
The user received their first meal kit delivery from Blue Apron, which included ingredients for salmon with roasted veggies, chicken fajitas, and a veggie stir-fry.
The user plans to modify the Lemon Garlic Chicken recipe by adding Yukon Gold potatoes and vegetables.
The user chose Yukon Gold potatoes for their Lemon Garlic Chicken recipe.
The user has a bottle of Cabernet Sauvignon from Trader Joe's, known as "Two-Buck Chuck."
The user intends to let the Cabernet Sauvignon breathe before serving it with their meal.
